business.headline: Why KYC is everywhere and why it frustrates so many IndiansCKYC was meant to make identity verification a one-time process, but for most Indians, KYC remains a repeated, unavoidable step across platforms. This story unpacks why a system built to simplify verification still leaves users proving who they are, again and again.

The first 30 days of FY27: 7 smart money moves to make in AprilThe new financial year has just begun, and April is the time to take charge. The decisions you make now can shape your money journey for the rest of the year. In our new 'MONEY MAKEOVER' series, we break down simple, smart steps to get started right.

Tech layoffs: Is AI replacing jobs or are companies fixing overhiring?Job cuts have been reported across tech companies, showing that the trend is not limited to a single type of company. The trend has raised a key question. Are companies correcting overhiring from the past, or is artificial intelligence starting to reduce the need for certain roles?

DA hike: How much will your salary and pension increase this time?With the next dearness allowance (DA) hike expected soon, central government employees and pensioners are watching closely. Even a small rise can push up monthly income, but how much extra can you really expect this time?

Markets down, rupee weak. Why Iran war may now hit your home loanThe impact of Iran war has not been limited to Dalal Street. The rupee has also come under pressure as oil prices moved higher. Now, the ripple effect of the conflict could reach households, especially those with home loans.

Iran war hit your portfolio? Track these 4 signals to stay ahead on Dalal StreetFor investors, the bigger challenge is not just falling markets, but the confusion around what to track. Headlines are changing rapidly, with mixed signals on escalation, oil prices and supply disruptions. This makes it difficult to take clear investment decisions.

Getting 8.2% on small savings? Don't invest before these 5 key checksGetting returns of up to 8.2% on small savings schemes may sound like an easy win. But before you lock your money in, it's worth pausing to check a few basics that could impact your finances later.

Income tax filing 2026: Which 5 key links should every taxpayer check now?Filing your income tax return in 2026 may feel a bit different this time. With the portal revamped and new rules in place, knowing where to click can save both time and effort. Here are five key links you should not miss.

Layoffs everywhere, but this company says no job cutsThe company has said it will not cut jobs despite ongoing global uncertainty. It has committed to retaining its workforce and continuing salary payments without delay.
Good Friday 2026: Is stock market open or closed today?Both stock exchanges, the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) and the National Stock Exchange (NSE), are closed on April 3 on account of Good Friday.

Why buying diamonds is expensive but fails as an investmentThe biggest issue with diamonds is the resale value. Unlike gold, which can be sold easily at market-linked prices, diamonds do not have a strong resale market.

Govt puts mandatory 60% free airline seat rule on hold amid jet fuel price riseThe government has put on hold its directive requiring airlines to offer at least 60% of seats without additional charges, pending further review.

Economic costs are increasing every day: Dr Sajjid Chinoy on impact of Iran warDr Sajjid Z Chinoy, MD and Chief India Economist at JP Morgan, discussed the escalating economic impact of the war on global and Indian markets.

India imposes 25% cap on monthly jet fuel price increase for domestic flightsIndia imposes 25% cap on monthly jet fuel price increase for domestic flights, Reuters reports citing an official statement

Good Friday holiday: Will NSE and BSE be open or closed on April 3?The stock market holiday list for 2026 includes a total of 16 non-trading days, excluding weekends. With several holidays already behind us, there are still multiple breaks lined up over the coming months.

Gold slips over RS 5,000, silver plunges Rs 15,000: What's behind the sudden fall?Precious metals, often seen as safe bets in uncertain times, have unexpectedly slipped. The latest drop in gold and silver prices has left investors wondering what's driving the decline despite global tensions.
Sensex ends 185 points higher, Nifty above 22,700; HCLTech up 3%Sensex ends 185 points higher, Nifty above 22,700; HCLTech up 3%

Markets rebound: Sensex, Nifty recover losses after early crash. Here's whyEarlier in the day, both Sensex and Nifty had fallen nearly 2%, reacting to fresh comments from US President Donald Trump, who said the United States would hit Iran "extremely hard" in the coming weeks.

Form 15G, 15H gone: Will new Form 121 simplify TDS for taxpayers?Form 121 is a self-declaration that allows individuals to request that no TDS be deducted on certain types of income. This usually includes interest earned from bank deposits, post office schemes, or similar sources.

Will the new Income Tax website make filing returns simpler for you?The new website brings together all income tax-related information in one place. According to the department, it is easier to navigate, faster to use, and built to reduce confusion for taxpayers who often struggle with forms, rules and procedures.

entertainment.headline: Rashmika cuts cake at airport, heads for birthday getaway with Vijay, family. Video Ahead of her birthday on April 5, Rashmika Mandanna cut a cake at the airport before flying out for a vacation on Saturday. Videos quickly went viral. Vijay Deverakonda and his family were also spotted, adding to the buzz around the celebrations.

Patriot trailer out: Mammootty-Mohanlal's film promises high-stakes spy action The trailer of Patriot brings Mammootty and Mohanlal together on screen after 18 years. The spy action drama promises an intense story around a controversial intelligence mission.

Dhurandhar, Chhaava and newcomer of 550 films: Anupam Kher with Ranveer and Vicky Anupam Kher's fun selfie with Ranveer Singh and Vicky Kaushal from NMACC's anniversary celebration grabbed attention online. The actor praised the duo's talent and dedication while calling himself a "newcomer" in a note.

Divya Dutta shares how she stood up to man harassing her sister: Whacked his wits Divya Dutta recalled a childhood incident where she confronted a man harassing her sister, crediting her mother for giving her the courage to stand up against wrongdoing. She was last seen in Chiraiya.

Malayalam director Ranjith gets 3-day police custody in assault case Malayalam director Ranjith has been sent to three-day police custody in a sexual assault case filed by an actor. The probe is being handled by a Special Investigation Team, while Keralam CM Pinarayi Vijayan said due process is being followed.

Dacoit trailer: Adivi Sesh, Mrunal Thakur lead a tale of love and betrayal The trailer of Dacoit promises a gripping tale of love, betrayal and revenge, led by Adivi Sesh and Mrunal Thakur. Packed with action and emotion, the film is set for a multilingual theatrical release on April 10.

Anurag Kashyap's Dev.D returns to theatres this April Dev.D, Anurag Kashyap's cult classic, is set to return to theatres this April. Known for its bold storytelling and memorable music, the film stars Abhay Deol, Kalki Koechlin and Mahie Gill.

Toaster trailer: Rajkummar Rao, Sanya Malhotra bring dark twist to everyday life Rajkummar Rao and Sanya Malhotra's Toaster trailer promises a quirky, chaotic story centred around an ordinary household item that leads to merry chaos. The films marks the debut as producer of actor and Rao's wife Patralekhaa.

Akshay Kumar joins Naagin 7 as Naag Guru, fans react to new promo. Watch Akshay Kumar makes a special appearance in Naagin 7 as the Naag Guru. The cameo has excited fans and coincides with the promotion of his upcoming film Bhooth Bangla, which has been postponed to April 17.

From 1,200 aspirants, how Sara Arjun bagged Dhurandhar opposite Ranveer Singh Casting director Mukesh Chhabra opened up about Sara Arjun's casting in Dhurandhar. He revealed that many actors vied for the role of Yalina opposite Ranveer Singh's Hamza.

Ranveer Singh brings full Bollywood chaos at NMACC bash, dances to Gallan Goodiyan Ranveer Singh's impromptu dance with Shreya Ghoshal and Shankar Mahadevan stole the show at NMACC's third anniversary. The trio danced to the popular track, Gallan Goodiyan.

Bloodhounds 2 review: Woo Do-hwan's show lands like a clean, decisive knockoutRelease Date:Fri Apr 03, 2026 Bloodhounds Season 2 returns with sharper action and stronger emotions, exploring brotherhood in the brutal world of underground boxing. The Korean thriller blends intense fights with heartfelt moments, keeping viewers hooked.

Vaazha 2 review: Bros, brawls and big feelings, a nostalgic ride that hits homeRelease Date:Thu Apr 02, 2026 A nostalgic, laughter-filled coming-of-age tale that is a perfect mixture of chaos, friendship, and emotion, the Malayalam film Vaazha 2 delivers a relatable and wholesome sequel that stands strong on its own.

Ranbir Kapoor confirms double role in Ramayana. Here's what his second role is Ranbir Kapoor confirmed he has a double role in Ramayana. Read on to know his second role apart from Lord Rama. Part 1 of the Nitesh Tiwari film is set for a Diwali release and the sequel next year.

Not a celebrity drama: Blake Lively says amid court battle, vows to fight back Blake Lively remains firm in her fight against "digital violence" despite a court dismissing most of her sexual harassment claims. She said online abuse and retaliation are widespread, and added that she is ready to tell her story in court next month.

NMACC's 3rd anniversary bash: Ranveer Singh, Salman, Vicky Kaushal lead guest list The third anniversary of the Nita Mukesh Ambani Cultural Centre (NMACC) was marked by a star-studded evening, with Bollywood names like Ranveer Singh, Salman Khan and Vicky Kaushal in attendance.

Why OTT shows from South should be on your watchlist right now Your watchlist is full and yet nothing feels worth watching — sounds familiar? OTT shows down the South have been quietly solving that problem, and it is time you noticed.

Dhurandhar 2 Day 16: Film surpasses Rs 1500-crore mark at the global box office Dhurandhar: The Revenge sustained strong box office momentum on its sixteenth day with a growth in earnings on Friday. The film currently trails behind Dangal, Baahubali 2: The Conclusion and Pushpa 2: The Rule in the list of all-time highest Indian global grossers.

Your Friends and Neighbors S2 first impression: Slick, sharp and slightly stretched Jon Hamm's Andrew "Coop" Cooper is once again back in the second season of Your Friends and Neighbors. The arrival of James Marsden injects fresh energy in a cocktail of existential dread and dark comedy.

general news.headline: 48 hours before all hell will rain down: Donald Trump to Iran on Hormuz blockadeEarlier, Trump had extended the deadline to reopen the critical energy chokepoint by 10 days, pushing it to April 6 after expressing optimism about ongoing talks with Iran.

From Kerala Story to Dhurandhar, Congress and Left are pros at lying: PMPM Modi accused the Congress and the Left of being a "factory of lies," alleging they called films like Kerala Story, Kashmir Files, and Dhurandhar false while spreading misinformation about the FCRA, UCC, and CAA, and creating unnecessary panic among people.

Iran's special message for India as 7th LPG tanker crosses HormuzIran's special message was in response to a post by Gujarat Deputy Chief Minister Harsh Sanghavi, who hailed the passage of the LPG tanker through the Strait of Hormuz as a 'victory for Indian diplomacy'.

Diplomatic mess, economic stress: Pakistan's double whammy amid Iran warPakistan tried to make a strong diplomatic move by leading mediation efforts between the US and Iran to end the war. However, Pakistan's ploy of trying to please all sides seems to have backfired. A rebuff from Iran and a strain in ties with Gulf states like the UAE have come as a double whammy for Pakistan.

One battle after another: Why AAP's loyalists drift away from Arvind KejriwalArvind Kejriwal's built AAP on the promise of principles. But it now thrives on blind loyalty, and prodigals like Raghav Chadha drift away, exposing a party built on talent too ambitious to stay in one man's shadow forever.

Brace up, Delhi: Rain, hail and thunderstorm arriving in the next hourIMD has issued an orange alert for Delhi as a narrow storm system pushes in from West UP, with eastern NCR, Noida and Faridabad most at risk between 8 PM and 9:00 PM tonight.

Your sons more in danger with Trump: Iran on plea of downed US jet pilot's motherIran told the mother of a US F-15 pilot missing after his aircraft was downed that her son faced greater danger under US President Donald Trump than in Iranian custody, asserting that he would be treated with dignity and respect if found.

GT vs RR Live Score: RR (70/1 in 6.2 ov). Sooryavanshi undone by Rashid KhanGujarat (GT) vs Rajasthan (RR) Live Score, IPL 2026: RR (70/1 in 6.2 ov). Vaibhav Sooryavanshi looks to take on Rashid Khan, but the experience comes into play, and the youngster has been outplayed by the stand-in GT skipper.

Ranveer Singh brings full Bollywood chaos at NMACC bash, dances to Gallan GoodiyanRanveer Singh's impromptu dance with Shreya Ghoshal and Shankar Mahadevan stole the show at NMACC's third anniversary. The trio danced to the popular track, Gallan Goodiyan.

Live: Russia evacuates 198 additional staff from Iran's Bushehr nuclear facilityUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: Iran has rejected a US proposal for a 48-hour ceasefire, an unnamed source told Iran's semi-official Fars News Agency. Israel pounded Beirut with airstrikes on Friday that the military said had targeted militant "infrastructure" in Lebanon's capital, as the US warned that Iran may target universities in the country as the Middle East war rages. More than 1,300 people have been killed ​in Israeli strikes and about a fifth of Lebanon's population has been displaced. Israel has issued evacuation orders covering around 15% of Lebanese territory.
1 dead, several trapped after four-storey hotel collapses in Madhya PradeshThe incident happened at around 5:50 PM in Kotma town. The building was located near the local bus stand.

Patriot trailer out: Mammootty-Mohanlal's film promises high-stakes spy actionThe trailer of Patriot brings Mammootty and Mohanlal together on screen after 18 years. The spy action drama promises an intense story around a controversial intelligence mission.
Why Donald Trump is the way he is. A psychoanalysisA study by a complete non-expert, which automatically qualifies him for a senior position in President Trump's Cabinet.

Watch: Magnus Carlsen agrees to selfie with opponent, then gets phone removedMagnus Carlsen shared a brief pre-match selfie with Alua Nurman before their Grenke Open clash, but quickly called an arbiter to enforce rules, highlighting chess's strict stance on devices.

Ghayal hoon isiliye ghatak hoon: Raghav Chadha's Dhurandhar comeback to AAP chargesIn a video posted on X, Chadha denied the allegations against him, saying he was compelled to speak out before the false claims gained some credibility.

Before Apple, there was India: The spiritual trip that changed Steve JobsBefore building Apple, Steve Jobs travelled to India in 1974, searching for meaning. His journey through ashrams, illness, and spiritual ideas left a deep imprint on how he saw life, simplicity, and design. Here we trace what really happened during that trip and how it shaped the man behind the iPhone.
Question Time: Weekly News QuizThink you read the headlines this week? Let's test that!

YC startup Delve in trouble, Indian-origin founders face open-source scandalDelve and Y Combinator have parted ways. The YC startup with two Indian-origin techies at the helm has been embroiled in controversy after an anonymous whistleblower – DeepDelver – claimed that Delve took an open-source tool and attempted to sell it as their own product.

UP woman, aiding grandson park Thar, crushed to death after he loses controlThe woman was guiding her grandson as the latter tried to park the car inside the premises of their house. After the vehicle went inside, the woman proceeded to close the gate. Video suggests that the driver lost control of the car as the gates were being closed.

Why OTT shows from South should be on your watchlist right nowYour watchlist is full and yet nothing feels worth watching — sounds familiar? OTT shows down the South have been quietly solving that problem, and it is time you noticed.

UAE asks Pakistan to repay $3.5 billion loan this month amid Middle East warPakistan has scheduled USD 3.5 billion loan repayments to the UAE in April, even as reserves rely on allied deposits and investment inflows remain weak amid IMF pressure.

How Iran is suddenly shooting US fighter jets out of the skyOver the past 24 hours, two US military aircraft were shot down, and Iran struck two Black Hawk helicopters. It punctured Donald Trump's claims of complete dominance by the US over Iran's skies. But how is Iran managing to target such advanced fighter jets?

Telangana man poisons twin daughters and drowns them in well. He wanted a sonA man allegedly poisoned and drowned his four-year-old twin daughters in a well in Telangana's Karimnagar district. The accused was upset about having girl children and wanted a son, which often led to frequent disputes with his wife.

sports.headline: Shubman Gill misses Rajasthan Royals clash in injury concern for Gujarat Titans IPL 2026, GT vs RR: Shubman Gill missed the clash against Rajasthan Royals due to a muscle spasm. Rashid Khan led the side in his absence, while Kumar Kushagra replaced him in the playing XI.

Sameer Rizvi blitz sinks Mumbai Indians in Delhi as DC make it two in a row IPL 2026, DC vs MI: Sameer Rizvi backed up his Lucknow masterclass with a masterful 90 at the Arun Jaitley Stadium to help Delhi Capitals make it two out of two. The home team chased 163 with ease, sealing a comprehensive six-wicket win over Mumbai Indians with two overs to spare.

Bangladesh cricket board moves to repair BCCI ties as president Bulbul under fire There is strong resentment in the Bangladesh cricket corridors about Animul Islam Bulbul's continuation, especially after Bangladesh pulled out of the men's T20 World Cup in India.

GT vs RR Live Score:RR (69/0 in 6 ov). Sooryavanshi, Jaiswal show no mercy to GT Gujarat (GT) vs Rajasthan (RR) Live Score, IPL 2026: RR (69/0 in 6 ov). Rajasthan Royals are leaving no stone unturned with both Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Yashasvi Jaiswal going blow for blow against the bowlers to maximise the powerplay.

DC vs MI: Hitman Rohit Sharma plays bluff man, dupes Delhi into a wasted review IPL 2026: Rohit Sharma's cheeky ploy fooled Delhi Capitals into wasting a review, which he later admitted was deliberate. His entertaining knock, however, ended soon after, as Mumbai Indians were restricted to a below-par total at Arun Jaitley Stadium in New Delhi.

Pat Cummins heads home for a final scan, expected to join SRH on April 17 Pat Cummins has returned to Australia for a final scan on his injured back and is expected to rejoin Sunrisers Hyderabad on April 17 after clearance from Cricket Australia. In his absence, Ishan Kishan has led the team as stand-in captain, with Abhishek Sharma as deputy

Watch: Magnus Carlsen agrees to selfie with opponent, then gets phone removed Magnus Carlsen shared a brief pre-match selfie with Alua Nurman before their Grenke Open clash, but quickly called an arbiter to enforce rules, highlighting chess's strict stance on devices.

Abuse me if you want, CSK are disappointing: Ashwin loses cool after PBKS loss IPL 2026: R Ashwin delivered an emotional assessment of CSK after their loss to PBKS. The former spinner said the team's drop in intensity was "painful to watch."

IPL, GT vs RR Preview: Boss Baby Sooryavanshi ready to rumble in Ahmedabad IPL 2026: Expect fireworks at the Narendra Modi Stadium as 15-year-old prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi leads Rajasthan Royals' explosive top order against Gujarat Titans' star-studded lineup.

Mumbai Indians rest Hardik Pandya for Delhi Capitals clash, Suryakumar Yadav leads IPL 2026, DC vs MI: Hardik Pandya has been rested for Mumbai Indians' first away game this season against the Delhi Capitals. In his absence, Suryakumar Yadav will lead the five-time winners.

Assam football legend Gilbertson Sangma dies at 71, leaves lasting legacy Gilbertson Sangma, known as Assam's "Man with the Golden Boot", died at the age of 71 in his Guwahati residence. The forward played a key role in shaping the state's football legacy.

DC vs MI Highlights: Sameer Rizvi's special gives Delhi Capitals win by 6 wktsDelhi Capitals (DC) vs Mumbai Indians (MI) Highlights, IPL 2026: Sameer Rizvi's special performance leaves Mumbai Indians scratching their heads. Delhi Capitals make it two wins in a row after beating MI by 6 wickets.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is the best player I've seen: Jos Buttler praises RR wonderboyIPL 2026: GT star batter Jos Buttler heaped praise on 15-year-old RR wonderkid Vaibhav Sooryavanshi in a viral moment. The England star backed the youngster to dominate world cricket in the years ahead.

CSK's biggest concern for the rest of IPL 2026 will be bowling, warns Sunil GavaskarIPL 2026, CSK vs PBKS: Sunil Gavaskar said Chennai Super Kings' bowling remains a major concern after their defeat to Punjab Kings, adding that the batters will be under pressure to post big totals in most matches.

Ronaldo scores on injury return, leads Al Nassr to 5-2 win to stay topCristiano Ronaldo scored twice on his return from injury as Al-Nassr defeated Al-Najma 5–2. The win strengthened their position at the top of the Saudi Pro League standings.

Kohli 'RCB's 5th overseas player'? Hilarious interview leaves batter in splitsIPL 2026: Virat Kohli shared a light moment over being called RCB's "fifth overseas player." The RCB star responded with humour while continuing his strong IPL 2026 form.

Jos Buttler just one innings away from best: GT coach backs star batterIPL 2026: GT assistant coach Aashish Kapoor has backed Jos Buttler to bounce back despite his recent dip in form. Kapoor believes the England star is just one innings away from his best.

IPL 2026: How Ricky Ponting transformed PBKS into a six-hitting forceIPL 2026: Ambati Rayudu revealed Ricky Ponting's unique squash-ball trick behind better six-hitting. The method may explain PBKS's rise as one of IPL's most explosive batting sides.

Shreyas Iyer fined Rs 24 lakh for 2nd over rate offence. Is he facing ban?IPL 2026: Shreyas Iyer has been fined Rs 24 lakh for PBKS' slow over-rate against CSK. The penalty comes despite a dominant chase that saw Punjab outclass Chennai at Chepauk.

Two bad innings don't define Sanju Samson: CSK coach defends struggling openerIPL 2026: CSK head coach Stephen Fleming has backed Sanju Samson despite his slow start in IPL 2026. The coach insisted two innings are not enough to judge a proven match-winner.

IPL Play of the Day: Chatur, chalak, chanchal Chahal chokes CSK at ChepaukCSK vs PBKS: Yuzvendra Chahal's set of 12 balls derailed Chennai Super Kings hopes of winning the first game of the season. In our IPL Play of the Day, we discuss how the wily old spinner was able to turn the game on its head.

Shirts or sponsor boards? Why IPL jerseys do not look good at allAn overload of sponsor logos, inconsistency in designs and sticking to two colours have made the IPL jerseys look functional and not iconic. The fans feel the disconnect and opt for counterfeit ones, rather than investing heavily on current IPL jerseys.

DC vs MI preview: Buoyant Delhi Capitals look to stop mighty Mumbai at homeIPL 2026, DC vs MI preview: Building on the momentum of a rare winning start, the mighty Mumbai Indians arrive in Delhi with Mitchell Santner's inclusion set to bolster an already formidable unit. However, the Capitals will be no pushovers in this high-octane afternoon clash at the Arun Jaitley Stadium.

Learn to chase like Kohli: Sehwag's advice to Raghuvanshi after KKR collapseVirender Sehwag urged Angkrish Raghuvanshi to learn the art of finishing from Virat Kohli after a promising knock ended in a costly run-out during KKR's failed 267 chase.

CSK captain throws bowlers under the bus after 6th straight defeat at ChepaukChennai Super Kings captain Ruturaj Gaikwad blamed his bowlers after the hosts failed to defend 210 runs against Punjab Kings on Friday. Gaikwad, who played a horror knock today, said that the total was enough to win the game.

PBKS hardly break sweat in 210 chase, hand CSK 5-wicket defeat at ChepaukCSK vs PBKS, IPL 2026: A 210 target proved little challenge for Punjab Kings, who cruised home despite a late wobble, as CSK's struggles at Chepauk continued with another defeat.

Minerva rout Liverpool 6-0 as Indian football finds hope in dark timesMinerva Academy's U-15 side stunned Liverpool with a dominant 6-0 win at the MIC Cup. The result offers a rare glimmer of hope for Indian football in difficult times.

Ayush Mhatre fails bat test twice, umpire error sparks bizarre scenesIPL 2026, CSK vs PBKS: Chennai Super Kings batter Ayush Mhatre was at the center of a bizarre bat test controversy in the group clash before responding with a stunning half-century at Chepauk.

Gambhir has won IPL and World Cup, must be doing something right: YuvrajIndia head coach Gautam Gambhir has found support from Yuvraj Singh. Speaking on SportsTak, Yuvraj said he was glad that Gambhir stuck to his methods during the T20 World Cup, despite the world telling him otherwise.

Jayawardene hits back at MI title drought talk: Some teams haven't won it foreverMahela Jayawardene, Mumbai Indians head coach, hit back at the talk around his team's recent IPL struggles, saying a five-year title drought does not take away from their success as one of the tournament's most successful franchises.

Chennai turns up for Ruturaj at toss, goes silent seeing him batCSK vs PBKS: Chennai Super Kings fans fell silent temporarily on Friday, after their captain Ruturaj Gaikwad played a stuttering innings in their first home game. Gaikwad, got out for 28 off 22 balls.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
